title: DeathSwapModern
description: A simple DeathSwap plugin for recent versions
body:
Have you ever wanted to try out the great gamemodes from the prime Minecraft era, but you found out they are only for version 1.16?

**DeathSwapModern** is a replication of the famous Death Swap mod in the **recent version**. It has also **death counter** and automatic changes in respawn points, so nothing disturbs your game flow. The order the game swaps between players is **random** and different every swap, so players have chance to meet with traps from different people. Players are notified 30 and 10 seconds before the swap in their action bar.

**Usage:**

_/startdeathswap_, _/startds_ or _/start_ + duration in between swaps in minutes (e.g.: _/start 5_ for 5 minutes between swaps) to start the game

_/stopdeathswap_ or _/stopds_ to stop the game and display results
